assignments.name: user_query
assignments.value: How does the partnership interview at Meta work, and do I need technical examples for it?

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO rag_transactions (
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  author_id_hash,
  incoming_message_ts,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.discord_message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_name }}',
  '{{ $json.author_id_hash }}',
  now(),
  'active_call',
  'created',
  'not_started',
  'not_started',
  '{{ $json.user_query }}'
)
RETURNING
  transaction_id,
  created_at,
  discord_message_id,
  channel_id,
  channel_name,
  author_id_hash,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  user_query;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = 'retrieving',
  retrieval_status = 'not_started',
  normalized_query = '{{ $json.normalized_query }}',
  query_hash = '{{ $json.query_hash }}'
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'
RETURNING transaction_id;

parameters.jsCode:
const state = $items('Initialize Runtime State')[0].json;
return [{ json: { ...state, embedding_started_ms: Date.now() } }];

const state = $items('Build Embedding Result')[0].json;
return [{ json: { ...state, qdrant_started_ms: Date.now() } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { vector: $json.query_vector, limit: $json.top_k, with_payload: true, with_vector: false } }}

parameters.query:
WITH rows AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset('{{ $json.retrieval_results_sql_json }}'::jsonb)
  AS x(
    qdrant_point_id text,
    rank integer,
    retrieval_score double precision,
    reranker_score double precision,
    channel_id text,
    channel_name text,
    thread_name text,
    first_message_id text,
    message_ids text[],
    start_ts timestamptz,
    end_ts timestamptz,
    dedupe_status text,
    dedupe_reason text,
    dedupe_matched_chunk_id text,
    dedupe_overlap_ratio double precision,
    dedupe_shared_message_count integer,
    rank_after_dedupe integer,
    selected_for_context boolean,
    payload jsonb
  )
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO rag_retrieval_results (
    transaction_id,
    qdrant_point_id,
    rank,
    retrieval_score,
    reranker_score,
    channel_id,
    channel_name,
    thread_name,
    first_message_id,
    message_ids,
    start_ts,
    end_ts,
    dedupe_status,
    dedupe_reason,
    dedupe_matched_chunk_id,
    dedupe_overlap_ratio,
    dedupe_shared_message_count,
    rank_after_dedupe,
    selected_for_context,
    payload
  )
  SELECT
    '{{ $json.transaction_id }}',
    qdrant_point_id,
    rank,
    retrieval_score,
    reranker_score,
    channel_id,
    channel_name,
    thread_name,
    first_message_id,
    message_ids,
    start_ts,
    end_ts,
    dedupe_status,
    dedupe_reason,
    dedupe_matched_chunk_id,
    dedupe_overlap_ratio,
    dedupe_shared_message_count,
    rank_after_dedupe,
    selected_for_context,
    payload
  FROM rows
  RETURNING 1
)
SELECT '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'::uuid AS transaction_id, count(*) AS inserted_count
FROM inserted;

parameters.jsCode:
const state = $items('Build Dedupe And Context Decision')[0].json;
return [{ json: { ...state, gemini_started_ms: Date.now() } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $items('Prepare Gemini Request')[0].json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, maxOutputTokens: 1000 } } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const state = $items('Build Gemini Result')[0].json;
return [{ json: { ...state, discord_started_ms: Date.now() } }];

const state = $items('Build Dedupe And Context Decision')[0].json;
return [{ json: { ...state, discord_response_text: state.refusal_text, discord_started_ms: Date.now() } }];

parameters.query:
UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = 'failed',
  retrieval_status = 'context_found',
  response_status = 'failed',
  refusal_reason = '{{ $items("Build Gemini Result")[0].json.gemini_failure_reason }}',
  completed_at = now(),
  latency_ms = GREATEST(1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - created_at))::int * 1000)
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $items("Build Gemini Result")[0].json.transaction_id }}'
RETURNING transaction_id, status, retrieval_status, response_status, refusal_reason, discord_response_message_id, latency_ms;

UPDATE rag_transactions
SET
  status = '{{ $json.final_status }}',
  retrieval_status = '{{ $json.retrieval_status }}',
  response_status = '{{ $json.response_status }}',
  discord_response_message_id = NULLIF('{{ $json.discord_response_message_id }}', ''),
  refusal_reason = NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.refusal_reason }}', ''), 'null'),
  completed_at = now(),
  latency_ms = GREATEST(1, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - created_at))::int * 1000)
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'
RETURNING transaction_id, status, retrieval_status, response_status, refusal_reason, discord_response_message_id, latency_ms;

SELECT
  transaction_id,
  route_type,
  status,
  retrieval_status,
  response_status,
  refusal_reason,
  failure_reason,
  discord_response_message_id,
  user_query,
  normalized_query,
  query_hash,
  created_at,
  completed_at,
  latency_ms
FROM rag_transactions
WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $items("Build Phoenix Final Checkpoint")[0].json.transaction_id }}';
